universe_note: DOES NOT OVERLAP with 2025 MLB historical backtest universe (CSV). These are spring 2026 games.

research_capability.reason: Spring 2026 spring training games; no result/outcome data available. Cannot train or evaluate CLV on this subset.
research_capability.blocker: No game outcomes recorded for spring training. Unsuitable for model evaluation.

conclusion: TSL spring 2026 data confirms multi-snapshot pipeline is technically operational. 1 game(s) show actual line movement. However, this data cannot bridge the 2025 historical backtest gap. MLB 2025 PAPER_ONLY status unchanged. True CLV research requires either: (a) external historical odds API for 2025 season, or (b) starting real-time TSL collection now for future 2026 regular season.
